title: Despite Javonte Williams Extension, Dallas Cowboys Still Need Help at RB
content: Javonte Williams signed a three-year extension with the Dallas Cowboys, but they need to ensure they don't run him into the ground in 2026.

title: Repairing Dallas City Hall could cost more than $1B, report says
content: A new report from the Dallas Economic Development Corporation estimates that the cost for full repairs on Dallas City Hall could exceed $1 billion over a 20-year span.

title: Cowboys re-signing Javonte Williams to 3-year, $24M deal
content: Running back Javonte Williams agreed to terms with the Cowboys on a three-year, $24 million contract, the team announced Saturday. Williams, 25, signed a one-year, $3 million deal with Dallas last offseason after spending the first four seasons of his career with the Denver Broncos.

title: Dallas Cowboys make big decision on key offensive playmaker
content: The NFL offseason is underway with a multitude of roster decisions to be made. Among those teams, the Dallas Cowboys have numerous to make. The Cowboys have made a big commitment to a key playmaker on offense.

title: Two camps, $1 billion fight in debate to raze or restore Dallas City Hall
content: The same report, two different readings. With a nine-figure repair estimate now public, the City Hall debate has grown louder. One side says it’s time to move. The other says restore the landmark. The Dallas Morning News asked a relocation advocate and a City Hall supporter to lay out their arguments.
